prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on TEMPO (2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine-1-oxyl, stable radical doublet) using DFT at the tier 'standard' level — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fit UKS) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2. Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, used as-is (no re-optimization). SCF converged in 12 cycles; all integrity checks passed; no warnings reported (warnings array empty). HOMO = −6.3375 eV (index 86), LUMO = −2.4651 eV (index 87), HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV (headline value). Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 6.3375 eV, vertical EA = 2.4651 eV, electronegativity = 4.4013 eV, chemical hardness = 1.9362 eV, softness = 0.5165 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 5.0025 eV. Total energy: −483.88366 Hartree (−13167.145 eV). Method: B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF, gas phase, UKS doublet. Integrity: trustworthy = true.
